world_preview_tfc.settings.title: World Preview Settings
world_preview_tfc.settings.general.title: General
world_preview_tfc.settings.general.head: General World Preview settings
world_preview_tfc.settings.general.threa:
Higher numbers speed up the preview.

However, using §lALL§r available threads may cause freezing.
world_preview_tfc.settings.general.struc:
Whether to check if a structure is §lLIKELY§r to start in a chunk.

Please note that these results may not be 100% accurate due to the complex nature of structure placement.

§6MODERATE performance impact§r
world_preview_tfc.settings.general.heigh:
Whether to generate a heightmap for the dimension

§cHIGH performance impact§r
world_preview_tfc.settings.general.contr: Show the controls in the preview tooltip
world_preview_tfc.settings.general.frame: Show the frame time of the preview render
world_preview_tfc.settings.general.showi:
Show a button for opening the preview in the pause menu

(Singleplayer only)
world_preview_tfc.settings.general.showp:
Show the current player and spawn on the in-game World Preview map

(Singleplayer only)
world_preview_tfc.settings.sample.title: Resolution
world_preview_tfc.settings.sample.head: Advanced biome sampling settings
world_preview_tfc.settings.sample.numChu: The size of a chunk in the preview.
This controls the zoom level of the map preview.
world_preview_tfc.settings.sample.sample: The amount of samples per chunk.
Minecraft supports a maximum of 4x4 = 16 samples per chunk.
Auto - Automatically choose the best value (Recommended)
world_preview_tfc.settings.cache.title: Caching
world_preview_tfc.settings.cache.game.en: Enable caching for the in-game preview
world_preview_tfc.settings.cache.new.ena: Enable caching for the World-Creation preview
world_preview_tfc.settings.cache.clear.t:
Clicking this button will clear the §6§lcurrent§r cache.

If the preview was opened from a running world, only the preview cache for §lthis§r world will be cleared. If the preview was opened during world creation, §oall§r previews for §oall§r seeds for the world creation will be cleared.
world_preview_tfc.settings.cache.compres: Enabling this option will reduce RAM usage but may slightly decrease the preview generation performance
world_preview_tfc.settings.heightmap.dis: §6Heightmap sampling is disabled in the general settings§r
world_preview_tfc.settings.heightmap.min:
This value corresponds to the §lleft§r-most color on the colormap.

Any y-values §llower§r than it will remain that color.
world_preview_tfc.settings.heightmap.max:
This value corresponds to the §lright§r-most color on the colormap.

Any y-values §lhigher§r than it will remain that color
world_preview_tfc.settings.heightmap.vis: Only sample for height values in the given y-range. This will improve performance at the cost of not showing the correct y-value for terrain outside the given range.
world_preview_tfc.settings.dimensions.he: Select the dimension to generate the preview for
world_preview_tfc.settings.biomes.title: Biomes
world_preview_tfc.button.tfc_temperature:
TFC Temperature

Display the TerraFirmaCraft base temperature map.
Shows temperature from cold (blue) to hot (red).
world_preview_tfc.button.tfc_rainfall:
TFC Rainfall

Display the TerraFirmaCraft rainfall map.
Shows rainfall from dry (brown) to wet (blue).
world_preview_tfc.button.tfc_land_water:
TFC Land/Water

Display the TerraFirmaCraft land and water map.
Shows ocean (blue), land (green), and shores (cyan).
world_preview_tfc.button.tfc_rock_top:
TFC Surface Rock

Display the TerraFirmaCraft surface/top rock layer.
Shows the rock types visible on the surface.
world_preview_tfc.button.tfc_rock_mid:
TFC Middle Rock

Display the TerraFirmaCraft middle rock layer.
Shows the rock types in the middle layer underground.
world_preview_tfc.button.tfc_rock_bot:
TFC Bottom Rock

Display the TerraFirmaCraft bottom rock layer.
Shows the deepest rock layer types.
world_preview_tfc.button.tfc_rock_type:
TFC Rock Type

Display the TerraFirmaCraft rock type categories.
Shows Oceanic (blue), Volcanic (orange), Land (green), and Uplift (purple).
world_preview_tfc.tfc.settings.title: TFC
world_preview_tfc.tfc.settings.head: TerraFirmaCraft World Generation Settings
world_preview_tfc.tfc.settings.temp_scal:
Controls the scale of temperature variation across the world.

Higher values = larger temperature zones.
Set to 0 to use a constant temperature.
world_preview_tfc.tfc.settings.temp_cons:
A constant temperature value used when Temperature Scale is 0.

-1.0 = Very cold
0.0 = Temperate
1.0 = Very hot
world_preview_tfc.tfc.settings.rain_scal:
Controls the scale of rainfall variation across the world.

Higher values = larger rainfall zones.
Set to 0 to use a constant rainfall.
world_preview_tfc.tfc.settings.rain_cons:
A constant rainfall value used when Rainfall Scale is 0.

-1.0 = Very dry
0.0 = Moderate
1.0 = Very wet
world_preview_tfc.tfc.settings.continent:
Controls the ratio of land to ocean.

0% = Mostly ocean
100% = Mostly land
world_preview_tfc.tfc.settings.flat_bedr: When enabled, bedrock will be a flat layer instead of irregular.
world_preview_tfc.tfc.settings.finite_co: When enabled, the world will have finite continents surrounded by ocean.
world_preview_tfc.tfc.settings.apply.too: Apply the current TFC settings and regenerate the preview.
world_preview_tfc.tfc.settings.spawn_dis: The maximum distance from the spawn center the spawn position will be chosen from 0.1KM to 20.0KM
world_preview_tfc.tfc.settings.spawn_cen: The center X position around which the spawn position is chosen from -20.0KM to 20.0KM
The center Z position around which the spawn position is chosen from -20.0KM to 20.0KM
world_preview_tfc.tfc.settings.grass_den: This is a number which affects how much grass generates in the world. Higher values indicate more grass coverage.
world_preview_tfc.button.resolution.tool:
Map Resolution

Cycle through zoom levels:
1x = Most zoomed out
16x = Most zoomed in

Higher values show more detail but less area.
world_preview_tfc.button.tfc_hotspot: Hotspot Map - Shows volcanic hotspot areas color-coded by age (red=youngest, purple=oldest)
world_preview_tfc.button.toggle_features:
Toggle Volcano Icons

Show or hide volcano and geological feature icons on the map.
world_preview_tfc.preview.btn-search-bio: Find the closest instance of the selected biome from the map center
world_preview_tfc.preview.island.tooltip: Only search for island variants of the selected biome (TFC)
world_preview_tfc.search.title: Seed Search
world_preview_tfc.search.area.tooltip:
Size of the area to search around the spawn center.
Larger areas find more features but search is slower per seed.
world_preview_tfc.search.max_seeds.toolt: Maximum number of random seeds to test before stopping.
world_preview_tfc.search.no_criteria: Select at least one biome or terrain feature to search for.
world_preview_tfc.search.complete: Search complete. Tested %s seeds, found %s matches.
world_preview_tfc.search.error_detail: Search failed. Check log for details.
world_preview_tfc.search.biome_mode.tool: Toggle between matching ANY selected biome (OR) or ALL selected biomes (AND).
